body_preview: - State tail shows evt-harness-* ModelCallCompleted events with tokens=in:0 out:0 cache_read:0 cache_write:0 that have no matching ModelCallStarted: ``` 1784660225962 ModelCallCompleted evt-harness-a9fb61e65f6f1387 run=run-1784660115834-47270 model=deepseek-v4-pro tokens=in:0 out:0 cache_read:0 cache_write:0 1784660225963 ModelCallCompleted evt-harness-58022
expected_evidence: After landing, `yyds state tail` on new runs shows every ModelCallCompleted has a corresponding ModelCallStarted (or harness-internal completions are suppressed/reclassified) Trajectory deepseek_model_call_unmatched_completed_count stops growing State doctor reports decreasing lifecycle gap trend Implementation Notes: The evt-harness-* events with zero token
title: Close harness-internal model lifecycle gap (evt-harness ModelCallCompleted without Started)
